title: guestfs-tools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.52.2-6]
- Update guestfs-tools firstboot.bat to match virt-v2v
  resolves: RHEL-109521

[1.52.2-5]
- builder: Update link to templates to use https
  resolves: RHEL-94874
full_text:
